author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Scorecard Fuzzing (0→10): add a fuzzing/property-based harness for the parser and codec surfaces

A fuzzing setup Scorecard recognizes (fast-check property tests wired into CI at minimum, ClusterFuzzLite/OSS-Fuzz integration evaluated and dispositioned on this item) exercises TOON decode/encode, history JSONL replay, cursor decode, and relative-date parsing; findings filed as defects; Scorecard Fuzzing scores non-zero

message: Scorecard: 'project is not fuzzed'. Highest-value fuzz targets are the untrusted-input parsers: TOON codec round-trip, append-only history JSONL reader (hash-chain verify on malformed streams), opaque cursor decode (PR#525 surface), meet/event relative-date parser (GH-450 class), extension manifest JSON. fast-check is free and CI-native; ClusterFuzzLite runs free on public repos via GitHub Actions; OSS-Fuzz admission is possible for widely-used OSS. Dedupe note: no existing fuzz item anywhere in the tracker (searched 2026-07-14).
